sql.query: WITH candidates AS (SELECT t.id,t.workflowId,t.taskName,t.status,t.dueDate,ws.stageName,ws.sortOrder,team.teamName AS assignedTeamName,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.workflowId ORDER BY ws.sortOrder,CASE WHEN t.status='in_progress' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,t.dueDate IS NULL,t.dueDate,t.id) rn FROM tbl_tasks t INNER JOIN tbl_workflow_stages ws ON ws.id=t.workflowStageId AND ws.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams team ON team.id=t.assignedToTeamId AND team.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE t.tenantId=:tenantId AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND (EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tbl_user_tenant_roles ownerMembership INNER JOIN tbl_roles ownerRole ON ownerRole.id=ownerMembership.roleId WHERE ownerMembership.tenantId=t.tenantId AND ownerMembership.userId=:userId AND ownerMembership.isActive=1 AND ownerRole.roleName='Owner') OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tbl_user_tenant_roles membership INNER JOIN tbl_team_members member ON member.tenantUserId=membership.id AND member.tenantId=membership.tenantId AND member.isActive=1 WHERE membership.tenantId=t.tenantId AND membership.userId=:userId2 AND membership.isActive=1 AND member.teamId=t.assignedToTeamId)) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tbl_task_dependencies d INNER JOIN tbl_tasks prerequisite ON prerequisite.id=d.dependsOnTaskId AND prerequisite.workflowId=t.workflowId AND prerequisite.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE d.taskId=t.id AND d.workflowId=t.workflowId AND d.tenantId=t.tenantId AND ((d.dependencyType IN ('finish_to_start','blocking') AND prerequisite.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')) OR (d.dependencyType='start_to_start' AND prerequisite.status='not_started')))) SELECT id,workflowId,taskName,status,dueDate,stageName,assignedTeamName FROM candidates WHERE rn=1 ORDER BY workflowId
